summary: New builder skill connect-cockpit. Wraps cockpit-side POST /api/operator/onboard-brand to provision Airbyte sources + Supabase rows for a brand, conversationally one platform at a time. Phantom operators can now wire their client brands to the Abyss dashboard without manual VPS or SQL access.

changes.summary: Builder Sonnet, subagent_safe: false, mode: direct, ~200 lines. Triggers: FR connect cockpit / branche le dashboard / wire data sources, EN connect cockpit / hook to cockpit. 6-step guided pipeline: confirm brand identity (read brand.json if present, ask if not), choose platforms (Shopify Meta TikTok Snap GA4 Google-blocked), collect credentials per platform with concrete fetch instructions, POST cockpit endpoint, handle 200/partial/4xx/5xx response, close with reasoned next-step. Hard rules: never expose payload IDs, one question per turn, no silent retry, no hardcoded brand names in examples, skip Google Ads until dev token approved.

Skill requires ABYSS_OPERATOR_TOKEN (provisioned by Largo via onboard-operator) and ABYSS_API_BASE (default https://app.abyss-initiative.com) in workspace-level credentials. Operators never hold Supabase service-role keys or Airbyte tokens directly. Server-side encrypts and stores all platform credentials.

operator_impact: Phantom operators can wire any brand to the Abyss cockpit (app.abyss-initiative.com) themselves via Claude Code. From workspace clone to live dashboard in 24h. Replaces previous workflow that required Largo manual Airbyte VPS UI for non-Shopify platforms.
compatibility: Backward-compatible. No schema migration. Pure additive skill. Existing skills (setup-brand, onboard-brand) unchanged.
